macro_summary: Last 4 days: US-Iran memorandum electronically signed with Pakistan as mediator (Trump defending the deal ahead of Switzerland implementation talks); Hormuz reopening expected to release oil supply and depress prices (negative for E&P, positive for OMC volumes and macro inflation); KSE-100 crossed 180,000 milestone then consolidated; current account posted $459m surplus in May; rupee firm; ADB $700m insurance-sector loan approved; Finance Minister Aurangzeb sees budget upside from the deal but called it 'way too premature' to revise projections; Pakistan plans $2bn Eurobond/Sukuk raise FY26-27.

OGDC.summary: FY26 oil & gas production missed targets (drilling shortfall); Hormuz reopening expected to depress crude prices and OGDC realisations. Two-front headwind sustained over the last 48h.
headlines: Pakistan misses oil, gas production targets as drilling falls short in FY26
Hormuz reopening to release wave of oil supply, depress prices

PPL.summary: Same FY26 production miss flows through to PPL volumes; Hormuz-reopening oil supply wave adds realised-price headwind.
headlines: Pakistan misses oil, gas production targets as drilling falls short in FY26
Hormuz reopening to release wave of oil supply, depress prices

SNGP.summary: FY26 gas production miss flows through to SNGPL throughput. No offsetting catalyst in the window.
headlines: Pakistan misses oil, gas production targets as drilling falls short in FY26

SSGC.summary: FY26 production miss balanced by ECC approval of gas supply for National Steel Complex revival — modest fresh demand tailwind.
headlines: Pakistan misses oil, gas production targets as drilling falls short in FY26
ECC approves gas supply for National Steel Complex revival

PSO.summary: Lower retail petrol prices (Hormuz reopening + govt-signalled cut) widen OMC volumes; $2bn sovereign Eurobond/Sukuk plan supports FX liquidity and improves PSO's circular-debt outlook.
headlines: Govt signals petroleum price cut as global oil rates ease
Hormuz reopening to release wave of oil supply, depress prices
Pakistan to Raise $2b via Eurobonds, Sukuk in 2026-27

AIRLINK.summary: Subsidiary Select Technologies IPO opens with book building June 22-23 — concrete dates lock in the AC-manufacturing capacity catalyst into next week.
headlines: Select Technologies IPO opens, book building June 22-23

PIBTL.summary: Port Qasim Authority renewing the Engro Vopak terminal implementation agreement validates terminal-sector longevity at the port — a read-across positive for PIBTL's own concession outlook.
headlines: Port Qasim Authority renews Engro Vopak Terminal implementation agreement

ATRL.summary: ARL received an offer for sale of 70% stake in Attock Hospital — non-core divestment crystallises cash and sharpens the refining-business focus. Group-level corporate action.
headlines: ARL receives offer for sale of 70% stake in Attock Hospital

NRL.summary: Attock-group hospital divestment (70% Attock Hospital stake sale) reads across to NRL as a group-level capital reallocation positive, though the direct cash impact sits at ATRL/holdco.
headlines: ARL receives offer for sale of 70% stake in Attock Hospital

PRL.summary: Indirect group read-through from the Attock-group hospital divestment; PRL's own balance-sheet impact is limited. Kept low-confidence — primary benefit accrues to ATRL.
headlines: ARL receives offer for sale of 70% stake in Attock Hospital

KEL.summary: DISCOs seeking Rs10bn additional recovery via tariff hikes supports cashflow visibility, but Dawn editorial flags that disco privatisation alone won't resolve sector stress — mixed read.
headlines: Power bills set to rise as DISCOs seek Rs10bn additional recovery
